famous quote:
Broken crayons still color
-David Weaver (and others)
Interview Text:
Will:

(part 3)

Now, at least 5 or 6 of the steps along the map have come to pass. But they believe that Papua New Guinea is the destination. 

"The one we're on right now," Will says, "is this image that came to me of a cluster of houses under a large hill or mountain." One year ago they were still intending to stay renting for a long time. But his same friend Tim was praying for them one day and randomly said, "Thank you, Lord for the house you're going to put the Galloways in."

And so they started considering buying a house. They first decided to look in Decatur, a suburb of Atlanta. But every one of the houses had something wrong with it. Every one fell through. But only because they all fell through did they find their current house they're moving to. It is right at the base of Stone Mountain, in a cluster of houses. 

Every single one of the steps along the map has been like that.
Music Video Instructions: Might God be saying this to us?
